data.description: ZELENSKIY SAYS UKRAINE READY FOR EASTER CEASEFIRE
ZELENSKIY SAYS HE RAISED TOPIC OF AIR-DEFENCE MISSILE SUPPLIES DURING TALKS WITH MIDDLE EAST LEADERS
IRAN'S FOREIGN MINISTER SPOKESPERSON BAGHAEI STATES THERE HAVE BEEN NO DIRECT TALKS WITH THE U.S., JUST COMMUNICATION THROUGH INTERMEDIARIES.

data.title: Iran is engaged in an information war with propaganda and disinformation to counter US and Israeli attacks on the internet.
data.description: A significant amount of propaganda and misinformation has been spread online to diminish backing for military actions carried out by the United States and Israel. This misleading content aims to manipulate public opinion and sway support away from these nations during their attacks.

data.title: 1970s oil crises caused panic with gas lines & prices quadrupling. Will Iran war have similar impact on world economy?
data.description: American consumers were alarmed by long gas lines and a fourfold increase in oil prices. This oil crisis had a major impact on global finance.

data.title: Tech executives in Silicon Valley are embracing small teams of just two: one person and artificial intelligence, as AI takes on more tasks.
data.description: With the increasing use of artificial intelligence in various tasks, tech executives are now forming teams as small as two members: one individual and an A.I. system. This trend reflects the growing reliance on A.I. in the business world.

data.title: Russian bakery faces survival amid 3,500% tax hike, showcasing economic crisis at Moscow's door.
data.description: A small business owner near Moscow is grappling with difficulties, shedding light on the potential crisis looming over Russia's economy, which has been severely impacted by the ongoing war. The situation underscores the challenges faced by businesses in the region and the uncertain economic future ahead.

data.title: Japanese Space-Tech Company Tenchijin Selected for Aerospace Valley’s “DISTRICT” Innovation Accelerator
data.description: Tenchijin Inc., a pioneering space-tech company from Japan, revealed its participation in the "DISTRICT" aerospace innovation accelerator hosted by Aerospace Valley in Toulouse, France. This initiative by one of Europe's top aerospace clusters will enable Tenchijin to enhance its sustainable water infrastructure management solutions. With France as a strategic hub for its European growth, the company has been proactively involved in exhibitions and industry gatherings to bolster its footprint and collaborate with potential partners.

data.title: Trump's policy change may lead to trouble as risky investments show strain, raising concerns.
data.description: The current US government is preparing to increase access to high-risk investments that seem to be under pressure.

data.title: A major real estate player emerged as Bard College received $82M worth of properties in Hudson, NY, with undisclosed plans.
data.description: An organization recently gifted properties valued at $82 million in Hudson, New York, to a school, whose intentions for the properties remain unspecified.

data.title: ATOM set to break $2.00 by April 2026. At $1.69, oversold signals seen with RSI at 37.82 hinting at short-term upside momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently priced at $1.69 and is showing signals of being oversold. Technical indicators are pointing towards a possible increase towards the $2.00 resistance level. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 37.82, indicating an accumulation zone for short-term traders. This suggests a potential rebound in the near future for Cosmos.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp DiaMedica Therapeutics Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: DiaMedica Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: DMAC) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Monday, March 30th. Analysts are anticipating a loss of 18 cents per share for the Minneapolis, Minnesota-based company. This matches the same 18 cents loss reported in the previous year. Earlier this month, DiaMedica Therapeutics obtained clearance from Health Canada to commence a Phase 2 study of DM199 in Preeclampsia. Following this news, the company's shares experienced a 0.9% drop, closing at $6.79 on Friday. For in-depth analyst ratings, readers can access the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can filter by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria. Discover more insights on Benzinga's latest accurate analyses and projections.

data.title: Logistics company GXO strengthens ties with NHS England in a new deal.
data.description: In recent news, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, the lowest it has been in the last 50 years. This decline marks a significant improvement from the previous rate of 4%. Additionally, the economy added 266,000 jobs in the same period, surpassing expectations and showcasing robust growth. These numbers indicate a thriving job market and a strengthening economy, providing optimism for both businesses and workers. The decrease in unemployment and the impressive job creation figures are positive signs for the overall economic outlook.

data.title: Guild Garage Group Announces Partnership with Kitsap Garage Door and Olympic Garage Door
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Guild Garage Group, a collaboration of companies specializing in residential garage door services, completed its partnership with Kitsap Garage Door and Olympic Garage Door. Guild aims to provide top-notch replacement, repair, and installation services with this partnership. This move signifies a strategic expansion for Guild, now having a stronger presence in the industry with combined resources and expertise from Kitsap and Olympic. This partnership is expected to lead to increased efficiency and customer satisfaction for Guild Garage Group, now serving a larger demographic with a wider range of services.

data.title: Vision Marine Technologies and Nautical Ventures Secure Exclusive Twin Vee Territory in Broward County and Introduce Signature Adventure V Edition
data.description: Vision Marine Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: VMAR) has announced its expansion of brand portfolio and retail execution strategy. The company, based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., specializes in high-voltage marine propulsion and is a vertically integrated marine retail provider. The news was released on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Leading Vision Insurance Plans for Individuals (2026): VSP Named Trusted Choice for Personal Coverage by Better Business Advice
data.description: In a recent industry analysis released on March 30, 2026, VSP Individual Vision Plans have been recognized as a reliable option among top vision insurance plans for individuals. The report by Better Business Advice emphasizes the plans' impressive provider network, consistent benefits, and emphasis on preventive healthcare. This endorsement suggests that VSP Individual Vision Plans stand out as a preferred choice for consumers seeking vision insurance.
